rationale: Both reviews identify and prioritize the exact same material api-design defects grounded in the diff (vacuous IsUnipotent under geomReduced; AlgPoints mismatch with Layer 0 functor-of-points; trivial True fields/lemma/instance), so acting on either produces essentially identical cleaned-up PRs by removing the premature API. Review 1's extra nits (naming, simp, rebinding, adding intro forms for placeholders) are either moot after the shared fixes or would add non-material work no maintainer would require at this stage.
